summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Matthews Asia Dividend Active ETF (ADVE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of dividend-paying companies located in Asia. The fund seeks to provide total return with a level of current income higher than average Asian equities. ADVE was launched on Sep 22, 2023 and is issued by Matthews.
